data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Consultation booking included (monthly check-in)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While there are bookings made, none of the evidence indicates that a monthly consultation is included as part of the subscription service. The linked use case mentions the need for a monthly consultation, but without concrete evidence of this feature being implemented or validated, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of a monthly consultation being included in the subscription service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
